Video.summary: For the first time ever, the World’s Strongest Latino competition has begun. This two-day event in Porto, Portugal, features 20 athletes from around the world competing in 8 events. After 4 grueling events, the top 12 will advance to the finals.
Video.title: SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 6 - World's Strongest Latino

Image.alt: SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 6 - World's Strongest Latino
SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 6 - World's Strongest Latino
SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 6 - World's Strongest Latino

Video.summary: Strongman Champions League World Record Breakers 2023 starts with a 25-ton snow plow! Crazy machines are pulled and pushed, with many kilograms moved. A few new world records are set in this competition.
Video.title: SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 7 - Finland World Record Breakers

Image.alt: SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 7 - Finland World Record Breakers
SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 7 - Finland World Record Breakers
SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 7 - Finland World Record Breakers

Video.summary: We have returned to the powerhouse of Portugal for an edge-of-your-seat galactic battle. If all the planets collided at once, it wouldn’t compare to the bang of this show. Get ready for the battle of the beasts; it’s the heaviest show in the universe, the Strongman Champions League.
Video.title: SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 8 - Portugal

Video.summary: SCL UK has landed in Gloucester it is workout war fitness for the ferocious, it’s going to be a a battle of the brutal, a rampage of the roofless. This is going to be a massacre of the muscles. You know it by now, but just in case you don’t, this is strongman champions league.
Video.title: SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 9 - England

Video.summary: On the menu this week it’s medieval madness, we’ve come back to the middle ages to test our noble men through a muscle gaining of events. They are hoping and we are hoping that one will survive to take the title of the world’s strongest Viking. The official World's Strongest Viking is this time in Finland.
Video.title: SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 10 - World's Strongest Viking

Image.alt: SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 10 - World's Strongest Viking
SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 10 - World's Strongest Viking
SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 10 - World's Strongest Viking

Video.summary: This week is a good one, can you feel the energy? Sit still, just look at me and try and feel the energy, because I can tell you, the atmosphere here is electric, it’s explosive, there is a pure elemental force going through these athletes' veins. I’m shaking because it’s Poland, it’s powerful, it’s strongman champions league, and you know what I'm going to say, get ready because it’s about to get heavy.
Video.title: Stage 11 - SCL Poland 2023

Video.summary: SCL Poland part 2 - Who will win the title in Poland and take 25 points for the world ranking. It is very exciting on the top, in part 1 between Poland and Latvia. Another great episode with super strongman events such as: Bag Toss Medley, Log Lift Reps and the Powerstairs. Also an interview with Mateusz Kieloszkowski, the all time favorite champion from Poland.
Video.title: Stage 12 - SCL Poland 2023

Video.summary: It’s time to show our strength and gain respect from the gods of Olympus. Our gladiators have many events set out by no other than Hercules himself. The coliseum is ready here on this mythological island of Cyprus, so we have landed in Limassol were again 12 Top Strongmen are battling for the title and ranking points.
Video.title: Stage 13 - SCL Cyprus 2023

Video.summary: The only and official world championship Truckpulling for its 10th year, again at the Strongman Champions league. With the 3 times Worldchampion Kelvin de Ruiter – defending his title. This championship has trucks in all shapes and sizes which is a lot like our athletes, there all different pay loads, but does the biggest win or is it the strongest.
Video.title: SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 14 - South Africa

Video.summary: Years and years of determination has brought us here today, when all the walls felt like they were caving in perseverance. When their bodies were screaming, hurting, shouting stop, beneath. These are the things which make up a man, these are the things that bring you world finalists. This episode they fight for the greatest title of all, they fight to put their names in the history books forever.
Video.title: Stage 15 - SCL World Finals Bosnia

Video.summary: Part 2 of the World Finals of the Strongman Champions League tour 2023 at the Sarajevo Centar Skenderija in Bosnia. 3 Events was done already and amazing results have been set. Who will be the new World champion? Find out here, who, after 16 stages, will be crowned World Champion 2023.
Video.title: Stage 16 - SCL World Finals Bosnia

Video.summary: After 10 years there is another edition of THE ICEMAN in minus 25 degrees and snow, and it is also the first stage in the MLO Strongman Champions League. With a new World champion from South Africa, Rayno Nel, it will be a challenging year for all the athletes to win the title again after 1 full year. But now they can win one very exceptional title, which is the SCL ICEMAN!
Video.title: Stage 1 - FINLAND – ICEMAN

Video.summary: A battle in the beautiful Caribbean Islands. Over 2 days and more than 10,000 spectators expected like previous editions. The cold temperature from the Iceman is changed in 35 degrees hot Martinique. Watch who gets the title in Martinique, events include: Truck Pull, Deadlift, Hercules Hold, Log Lift, and Arm Over Arm Pull.
Video.title: Stage 2 - MARTINIQUE - 2024

Video.summary: The SCL Hungary this year is in the AQUAPARK in Budapest, Stage 3 from the spectacular MLO Strongman Champions League, World is Biggest Pro League. With five great events, such as: Viking Press, Farmer's Walk, Deadlift, Conan's Wheel, and A loading race with Beer barrels of 200 Kg. It is a must see!
Video.title: Stage 3 - HUNGARY - 2024

Video.summary: We're in Zrenjanin, Serbia, again a fantastic stage in the SCL WORLD SERIES TOUR 2024, five events including a super human Yoke race. Who will be the yellow leader for the coming season and take the title with 25 championship points?
Video.title: Stage 4 - SERBIA - 2024

Video.summary: We're in Groenlo, east of Holland With the new Talent from South Africa and 2025 Strongest Man of the World - Rayno Nel. The first 3 events are Truckpull, Log Lift and Loading race. So, join us for the show of strength, the place of power, it is the circus of the extreme.
Video.title: Stage 5 - HOLLAND - 2024 - Part 1

Video.summary: SCL Holland part two. Get ready because it is about to get heavy. The Strongman Champions League in Holland , continues with the last 3 events, here at the venue in Groenlo. The events in this episode are the Conan Wheel, Farmers Walk and the Atlas Stones, with a brutal 200kg stone at the end.
Video.title: Stage 6 - HOLLAND - 2024 - Part 2

Video.summary: Strongman Champions League: World Record Breakers 2024 kicks off with the Truck Pull, followed by the Front Hold, Frame Carry, Tractor Pull, Shield Carry, Sandbag Toss, and concludes with the intense Loading Race. This two-day competition features all the top strongmen from Finland-and it's one for the history books. Three new world records are shattered, making this a must-see episode for...
Video.title: Stage 7 - FINLAND - 2024 - World record breakers

Video.summary: For the first time in over 10 years back in Estonia, in Tartu. 12 of the Strongest athletes in the world will fight here for the title and the overall world championship points. You will see 5 crazy events, such as: Boat Pull, Viking Press, Medley, Conan's Wheel and a very heavy Power Stairs!
Video.title: Stage 8 - ESTONIA - 2024

Video.summary: We have returned to Portugal, at the beach of Eposende, to bring you EUROPE'S STRONGEST LATINO. In the beautiful sun of Portugal five cruel events are done in this heat: Truck Pull, Deadlift, Log Lift, Sandbag Toss, Medley.
Video.title: Stage 9 - PORTUGAL - 2024

Video.summary: A spectacular event on the beach of Gdansk, Poland. A competition in the sand and in the water. Complete with a boat pull. With an impressive line up again, we welcome you to watch us LIVE in the SCL Poland.
Video.title: Stage 10 - POLAND - 2024

Video.summary: The Strongman Champions League Train stops in Dubai again for the 3rd time, and is now bigger than ever. Hafthor Bjornsson makes his come back here at the SCL DUBAI. You simply cannot miss this most epic show at the World Trade Center in Dubai part 1.
Video.title: Stage 11 - DUBAI - 2024 - Part 1

Video.summary: After three cruel events in part 1, the World record holder on the deadlift with 501 Kg, will fight for the crown and the title. You simply cant miss this most epic show, at in the World Trade Center in Dubai part 2.
Video.title: Stage 12 - DUBAI - 2024 - Part 2

Video.summary: Superhumans arrive in Limassol. Great strongmen from all over the world will compete in the Old Port of Limassol , for the title and championship points. More than ever important this stage, as we come so close to the World Finals in Turkey this year.
Video.title: Stage 13 - CYPRUS - 2024

Video.summary: With 12 of the world's best athletes arriving in Cape Town, South Africa, all fighting for the crown and final ranking points ahead of the World Finals in Turkey. Rayno Nel still needs to qualify along with Brian Kichton also battling for a seat in the World Finals.
Video.title: Stage 14 - SOUTH AFRICA - 2024

Video.summary: This episode contestants fight for the greatest title of all, they fight to put their names in the history books forever. Twelve finalists from all over the world are in Turkey and will fight for the ultimate title: WORLD CHAMPION 2024.
Video.title: Stage 15 - TURKEY - WORLD FINALS - 2024 - PART 1

Video.summary: Part 2 of the world final of the Strongman Champions League tour 2024 in Alanya, Turkey. With three Events down and amazing results. Who will be the new World champion?
Video.title: Stage 16 - TURKEY - WORLD FINALS - 2024 - PART 2
